{{Quote|It's an ambush! All hands to battle stations! We'll teach these pirate scum to stay clear of Mandalore!|The Supreme Strategist|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
The '''Supreme Strategist''' was a high-ranking official of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] and a Clan Chieftain. He was of an unknown species, and commanded a [[Keldabe-class cruiser]]. Some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Tyber Zann]]'s fledgling [[Zann Consortium/Legends|organization]] managed to commit piracy above Mandalore by [[Mission to Mandalore (Zann Consortium)|kidnapping]] the Supreme Strategist. He was fought to the death, destroying the five squadrons of [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-wing starfighters]] that had been sent ahead and destroying or disabling all of the escort vessels.
